scenario_name: Scenario 18 — Expert Subtle Bug: Event Loop Blocking
justification: All pass criteria met: parseXmlSync identified as Critical event-loop blocking issue; 200 webhooks/min + 2MB + sync = event loop saturation clearly explained with math (50ms × 3.3/sec); async parsing recommended; early-response + failure inconsistency noted as first critical finding (premature 200 ACK before processing, unhandled errors after response); idempotency concern noted in suggestions; safe_to_deploy is false.

observations.text: Sync XML parsing correctly identified as Critical with detailed event loop blocking explanation including quantified impact
Early 200 ACK issue elevated to first critical finding with excellent analysis of crash-after-response scenario and silent data loss
Idempotency concern explicitly called out in suggestions
Bonus finding: map key collision bug (trackingNumber overwrite) is a legitimate additional critical issue not in the rubric
Concrete reproduction steps and fix recommendations for each finding
safe_to_deploy is false with clear rationale
